meaning: 巴东[印度尼西亚苏门答腊岛西岸港市] ;n.(马来西亚的)运动场,球场
examples: In September 2009, a magnitude 7.6 earthquake struck just offshore from Padang.
Other tremors have shaken Sumatra, including one in 2007 that killed scores in Padang.
The section is centered under the island of Siberut, off the Sumatran coastal city of Padang.
Employees picketed Gresik's plants not only in Padang but in East Java and South Sulawesi.
The West Sumatran capital, Padang, with about a million residents, is near the epicenter.
